{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output does not assert novelty without specific contrast, but it also doesn't map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement is observed in the agent output.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, as the agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers mostly within scope with one drift.",
    "RX.4": "Harm-free but with one minor regression; the agent output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but it's unclear if this applies to all changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output does not assert novelty without specific contrast, but it also doesn't map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement is observed in the agent output.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, as the agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope with one drift.
rationale.RX.4: Harm-free but with one minor regression; the agent output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but it's unclear if this applies to all changes.
